basic_details.job_title: NIT Raipur – Junior Research Fellow (JRF) – 1 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Raipur (NIT Raipur) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). Candidates with B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 17-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through NIT Raipur official website.

age_limit.age_details: Maximum 35 years. However, candidates above 35 years are eligible to apply.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. in Biomedical/ Electronics/ Electrical/ Mechanical Engineering or equivalent branches with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA (out of 10) in B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. OR B.E./B.Tech. from any Institute of National Importance with minimum 75% marks or 8.0 CGPA (out of 10).

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- per month + HRA, for first two Years and Rs. 42,000/- per month + HRA, for third Year

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: NIT Raipur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
